decisions: Decision: Create candidate backtesting module in src/backtesting/candidate/ | Rationale: Need to implement walk-forward backtesting with 30d train/7d test windows and ranking pipeline
learnings: Learning: Walk-forward backtesting prevents look-ahead bias by strictly separating train/test periods | Impact: High | Category: architecture
Learning: Transparent ranking with visible criteria weights builds trust in candidate selection | Impact: Medium | Category: process
